title: Configuration Analyst Intern
summary: Provide analysis of AI features and their potential integration with Yale's ServiceNow platform.
highlights: Configuration and maintenence of ServiceNow forms, fields, workflows, and catalog items
Quality Assurance and comprehensive testing of new features and configurations before release
Provide assistance in incident, request, and ticket workflow improvements
Documentation of key configurations, processes, and support procedures to mantain operational tempo

title: Facilities Support
summary: Provide facilities support in customer-facing service and janitorial roles.
highlights: Fulfill variable customer demands and special requests
Provide satisfactory level of service regardless of customer difficulty
Mantain cleanliness of all mission-critical surfaces
Enforce hygenic standards in operational environment as well as customer-facing areas
Disposal of waste products according to established industry standards

title: Infantryman
summary: Complete mission objectives using established infantry doctorine.
highlights: Mantain composure in suboptimal operating conditions
Secure objectives according to highly variable leadership directives
Unit cohesion in hostile environments with leadership of questionable competence
Mantain proficiency according to qualification standards with all issued weapon systems
Effective engagement, suppression, and destruction of hostile forces
